description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular silhouette with two sturdy short handles for hand carrying. The exterior is adorned with a repeating geometric pattern in shades of red and brown, giving it a distinctive and stylish appearance. The bag appears to be made primarily of a textured fabric or coated canvas, with reinforced leather or faux leather trim along the edges and handles. The top of the bag is equipped with a zipper closure, ensuring the contents are secure. Decorative elements are minimal, focusing on the patterned surface and the clean lines of the design. The overall look is both functional and fashionable, suitable for urban environments.
description: A rectangular handbag with a red and brown geometric pattern, short handles, and a zipper closure, featuring minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the bag and the reinforced trim along the edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the geometric pattern, dual short handles, and zipper closure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the bag's depth and side seam.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the patterned surface and handle attachments, with visible zipper track.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed handles attached at the top for hand carrying; no long or adjustable straps visible.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top opening of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Repeating geometric pattern in red and brown tones.
